name: Eyes of Love
overview: The series revolves around the family of (Abu Rashid) consisting of his wife (Aisha) and their four children, where the mother suffers from psychological problems, but she is stable in her life with her family until her aunt (Abu Rashid) and her daughter (Munira) come to them to live with them after the death of Mounira's husband, and (Munira) covets to marry (Abu Rashid).

trailers.title: مسلسل عيون الحب الحلقة 1 - جاسم النبهان - هدى حسين
